prompt:
礼品属性
用途：提升“送礼不出错”的心理。  
构图：  
- 父亲节给父亲送的礼物，不需要包装卡片之类的
- 光线更暖，强调“拿到手会很体面”。    
风格：高端礼品感、温馨自然。

Professional Amazon product photography, Father’s Day Personalized Wooden Cutting Board, 正面平视，完整展示四周边框与木纹 镜头：平视角度（90°） 光线：柔和均匀、突出木纹层次 背景：纯白背景（RGB 255,255,255）, text overlay "Father’s Day Personalized Wooden Cutting Board", subtitle "Custom Name • Family Gift for Dad", professional typography, clean font, centered text, readable text overlay on product image, cinematic commercial photography style

Professional Amazon product photography, Father’s Day Personalized Wooden Cutting Board, 正面平视，完整展示四周边框与木纹 镜头：平视角度（90°） 光线：柔和均匀、突出木纹层次 背景：纯白背景（RGB 255,255,255）, text overlay "Father’s Day Personalized Wooden Cutting Board", subtitle "Custom Name • Family Gift for Dad", professional typography, clean font, centered text, readable text overlay on product image, cinematic commercial photography style

Professional Amazon product photography, Premium Craftsmanship Detail, 只拍到砧板主体，不要出现桌面大面积 镜头：近景特写（45-60°小角度也可，但必须清晰） 光线：柔光、木纹纹理清楚，阴影轻 背景：干净简洁背景（可接近纯白/浅灰）, text overlay "Premium Craftsmanship & Engraving", subtitle "Clear Custom Text, Real Wood Texture", professional typography, clean font, centered text, readable text overlay on product image, cinematic commercial photography style

Professional Amazon product photography, Premium Craftsmanship Detail, 只拍到砧板主体，不要出现桌面大面积 镜头：近景特写（45-60°小角度也可，但必须清晰） 光线：柔光、木纹纹理清楚，阴影轻 背景：干净简洁背景（可接近纯白/浅灰）, text overlay "Premium Craftsmanship & Engraving", subtitle "Clear Custom Text, Real Wood Texture", professional typography, clean font, centered text, readable text overlay on product image, cinematic commercial photography style

Professional Amazon product photography, Everyday Dad Kitchen Moment, 中景，砧板放在厨房木桌/深色台面上，留出“阅读”空间 镜头：中景（产品占画面主要比例） 光线：暖自然光（让木色更高级） 背景：真实厨房环境的轻微虚化（仍需清晰看见砧板本体）, text overlay "A Daily Kitchen Essential for Dad", subtitle "Perfect for Chopping, Serving, and Hosting", professional typography, clean font, centered text, readable text overlay on product image, cinematic commercial photography style

Professional Amazon product photography, Everyday Dad Kitchen Moment, 中景，砧板放在厨房木桌/深色台面上，留出“阅读”空间 镜头：中景（产品占画面主要比例） 光线：暖自然光（让木色更高级） 背景：真实厨房环境的轻微虚化（仍需清晰看见砧板本体）, text overlay "A Daily Kitchen Essential for Dad", subtitle "Perfect for Chopping, Serving, and Hosting", professional typography, clean font, centered text, readable text overlay on product image, cinematic commercial photography style

Professional Amazon product photography, Father’s Day Gift Presentation（无包装道具规则）, 中景，人物动作为“递给爸爸/摆到桌上”的瞬间捕捉 镜头：中景，捕捉轻松表情 光线：温暖家庭光，带轻微金色氛围 背景：温馨家庭餐桌/厨房局部，无礼盒小卡片等包装元素（按你的约束：禁止礼盒礼袋小卡）, text overlay "Ready to Be His Favorite Gift", subtitle "Personal • Thoughtful • Made for Dad", professional typography, clean font, centered text, readable text overlay on product image, cinematic commercial photography style
